## 🔬 MedGuard AI — Clinical Audit / Pull Request

### 🩺 Type of Change
- [ ] 🐞 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💊 ML model update (changes to DDI/Synergism weights)
- [ ] 📄 Documentation / Audit log update

### 📝 Executive Summary
(Provide a concise description of the changes and the clinical rationale behind them)

### 🧪 Technical Validation
- [ ] `pytest backend/tests/` passes verified (Backend)
- [ ] `npm run test` passes verified (Frontend)
- [ ] Manual smoke test in local cluster environment completed
- [ ] 3D visualizations verified on mobile/desktop breakpoints

### 🖼️ Visual Evidence
(Attach screenshots or screen recordings if UI logic was modified)

### 🚨 Pre-Merge Checklist
- [ ] No hardcoded PII or system secrets
- [ ] New environment variables documented in `.env.example`
- [ ] Pharmacological data accuracy verified against trusted datasets (e.g., DrugBank)
- [ ] Branch is synchronized with `main`

---
*MedGuard AI — Advanced Agentic Coding Compliance*
